title: Rebuild 20 screen caps 20min camrip
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild 2.0 screen caps (20min camrip) (SPOILERS DOH) Post by bladerj » Mon Jul 13, 2009 10:04 pm Hi, new here, and with this i drop this. at request (again) bigger [URL=http://img404.imageshack.us/i/merge09.jpg/] [/URL]

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 13, 2009 10:18 pm Dimensions way too big for the resolution. Actual size is at least half of what you're posting them at; quality is so bad that nothing's gained by blowing the screenshots up.

[]: Post by bladerj » Mon Jul 13, 2009 10:30 pm Really ? wow, i didnt notice......try a quarter of the size, but if its too bad, i'll post in the original size and you guys can have fun using the windows magnification glass.

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 13, 2009 10:57 pm I think you overcompensated somewhat... yeah.

[]: Post by LiLi » Tue Jul 14, 2009 4:29 am Thanks! I like the wee little screencaps.

[]: Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Jul 14, 2009 7:35 am Looks really cool but if you could create the full Res image but instead of a link to viewing it on Tinypic.com or something.

[]: Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Tue Jul 14, 2009 11:37 am Oh, I get it. By posting the five frame glimpse of Asuka from the 3.0 preview first, you're creating the illusion that she actually has a valid role in the last part of 2.0 and isn't completely buried by Mari. How cute.

[]: Post by bladerj » Tue Jul 14, 2009 1:27 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: Looks really cool but if you could create the full Res image but instead of a link to viewing it on Tinypic.com or something.

[]: Post by Barong » Tue Jul 14, 2009 2:05 pm I Accidentally Dracula wrote: Oh, I get it. By posting the five frame glimpse of Asuka from the 3.0 preview first, you're creating the illusion that she actually has a valid role in the last part of 2.0 and isn't completely buried by Mari. How cute.

[]: Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Tue Jul 14, 2009 4:47 pm The picture? oh I agree.

[]: Post by OKdesuKA » Tue Jul 14, 2009 5:52 pm Barong wrote: I Accidentally Dracula wrote: Oh, I get it. By posting the five frame glimpse of Asuka from the 3.0 preview first, you're creating the illusion that she actually has a valid role in the last part of 2.0 and isn't completely buried by Mari. How cute.

[]: Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Tue Jul 14, 2009 7:18 pm I'm positive the people that have clicked this thread have probably watched the cam themselves and already know that Asuka is not even acknowledged in that last scene.

[]: Post by bladerj » Tue Jul 14, 2009 7:28 pm I Accidentally Dracula wrote: I'm positive the people that have clicked this thread have probably watched the cam themselves and already know that Asuka is not even acknowledged in that last scene.

[]: Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Tue Jul 14, 2009 8:38 pm bladerj wrote: Everybody who

[]: Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Jul 14, 2009 8:38 pm Nice caps, wish they were HD though but I will get that wish in time.

[]: Post by bladerj » Tue Jul 14, 2009 8:44 pm I Accidentally Dracula wrote: bladerj wrote: Everybody who
